summary: On April 16-17, 2026, Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, Krasny Liman, Belgorod, and Sumy directions, destroying 105 Ukrainian personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, with one additional fixed-wing UAV and long-range UAV downed on the 17th; they also conducted remote mining of Ukrainian logistics routes and cooperated with Russian Aerospace Forces to target Ukrainian UAV launch points. In a separate incident near Krasny Liman, Russian forces intercepted and captured a Ukrainian "Shark-M" UAV using the "Yolka" air defense drone, triggering its parachute system and recovering it with minimal damage. Meanwhile, Ukrainian forces employed FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and another who feigned surrender, while also using electronic warfare to disrupt Russian FPV operations, as seen when Ukrainian troops survived an FPV attack near Kostiantinivka after detecting the drone with a detector.
